src: EspHome-Editor is a tool designed to streamline the creation and management of YAML configurations for EspHome. If you're working with devices that have many similar components or deploying multiple similar devices, this tool is here to save you time and effort
ja: EspHome-EditorはEspHome向けYAML設定の作成と管理を効率化するツールです。多数の類似コンポーネントを持つデバイスや複数の類似デバイスをデプロイする場合に、時間と手間を節約できます。
